'''''The Lost Jedi Adventure Game Book''''' is a "choose your own adventure"–style roleplaying story, written by [[Paul Cockburn]] and published, in the United Kingdom only, by [[Boxtree]] in 1995.

Collecting the individual books ''[[Jedi Dawn]]'' and ''[[The Bounty Hunter]]'', each published in 1993, ''The Lost Jedi'' chronicles the adventures of [[Havet Storm]], the lone surviving descendant of slain [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Morvet Storm]].

==Plot summary==
===''Jedi Dawn''===
Set in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], ''Jedi Dawn'' sees [[Havet Storm]] inherit his grandfather's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and discover that he has within him the potential to become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Running from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents that killed his family, Havet arrives on the planet [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]], location of a high-security Imperial Research Station. Shortly after arriving on the planet, Storm makes a personal enemy of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and becomes embroiled in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] attempts to steal the plans to a frightening new Imperial [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]].

===''The Bounty Hunter''===
In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], two years after the events of ''Jedi Dawn'', Havet Storm, now a wanted man, attempts to leave the planet Toprawa, but finds himself once again involved in galactic affairs: running from the villainous [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] Boba Fett in an attempt to find and warn the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] nefarious plans—before it's too late.
